group.value: Group I — opponents Senegal, Iraq, Norway

manager.value: Didier Deschamps (has announced 2026 World Cup will be his final tournament in charge)

qualification.value: Qualified as a UEFA group winner (direct) in 2025 European Qualifiers

recent_form.value: 2022 World Cup runners-up; 2018 champions. Enter 2026 as a top-3 ranked side and one of the pre-tournament favorites.

wc_role.value: Favorite / contender — deep attacking pool led by Mbappé and Ballon d'Or winner Dembélé

key_players.value: Kylian Mbappé (captain), Ousmane Dembélé, Désiré Doué, Michael Olise, Rayan Cherki, William Saliba

squad_news.value: Mbappé included and set to captain despite a thigh injury that cost him Real Madrid's La Liga run-in. Eduardo Camavinga and Randal Kolo Muani omitted; PSG keeper Lucas Chevalier also left out.
